scripts.validate:sop: python3 skills/build-newcomer-sop/scripts/validate_sop.py --library sop/04-职场新人SOP库.json --taxonomy sop/data/career-taxonomy.v2.2.json --tests sop/07-入职SOP测试案例.json
scripts.build:sop: node scripts/build-sop-runtime.mjs --library sop/04-职场新人SOP库.json --taxonomy sop/data/career-taxonomy.v2.2.json --output api/_generated/sop-runtime.js
scripts.eval:sop:pilot:dry: python3 scripts/run-sop-evals.py --docs-dir sop --suite posthire --case-id DEV_SOP_002 --case-id DEV_SOP_004 --case-id DEV_SOP_014 --case-id DEV_SOP_020 --dry-run --output-dir sop/eval-results/pilot/dev-dry-run
